_comment: Your own prompts. Used when a category's prompt_source = 'manual'. Each category may be a single string OR a list of strings (rotated by cycle number). Edit these to whatever you want to send to every model.
code: Write a thread-safe work-stealing thread pool in Java with per-worker deques, supporting task submission, graceful shutdown, and awaitTermination. Document the concurrency strategy and write comprehensive JUnit 5 tests including a stress test.
text: Write an in-depth, approximately 1000-line article on the global landscape of research and academic grants: major funding bodies, the peer-review process, success rates, common pitfalls in proposals, and trends in open science funding. Use clear headings and examples.
email:
Reply professionally to this email in at least 200 words:

Subject: Acquittal report overdue for Grant #2025-118

Dear grantee,

Our records show that the final acquittal report for Grant #2025-118 was due three weeks ago and has not yet been received. Please submit the completed financial acquittal and outcomes report, along with copies of receipts for all expenditure over $500, within ten business days. If there are reasons for the delay, let us know so we can discuss options.

Regards,
Grants Administration Team
image: Generate an image that visually explains this feature: an automated reminder system in a grants web app that emails applicants three days before their report is due, then escalates to the program manager if the report is still missing on the due date.
